name: design-guide
description: Design guide — component selection, interaction patterns, AI experience patterns, Figma design creation
intent: Choose the right PF components and patterns when building
decisionTest: Does this help me choose the right PF components and patterns when building?
crossRef: Use this plugin when you're **building** something and need help choosing the right PatternFly components, patterns, or design language. For **validating** existing code or designs against PF standards, see [design-audit](../design-audit/).
